title: Invisible Item Frames [Stonecutter]
description: Make item frames & glow item frames invisible via the Stonecutter. Includes resource pack.
body:
## Make Invisible Item Frames via the Stonecutter!
  
Easily "craft" invisible item frames and invisible glow item frames by placing them in the stonecutter.  
  
Includes an "undo" feature, to craft them back to normal item frames so you don't have to place & break them again to revert them to visible. This also makes it easier to re-stack them for inventory management.  
  
**Use this datapack with the included Resource Pack to have a visual difference for your invisible frames!**
